channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned trolley overflowing with rubbish, 20th July
item.description:
Abandoned Trolley Lat/Long - 51.4234267, -0.0346126 what3words - skinny.exit.milky Nearest address - Screwfix, Unit 1, Lower Sydenham Industrial Estate, Kangley Bridge Road, Lower Sydenham, London, SE26 5BA
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of food (bin bags), 20th July
item.description:
In front left of commercial unit Spirales. Several bags have been dumped.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wenlock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway between Granby and Arsenal Roads, 20th July
item.description:
This alleyway appears to be an adopted pavement . The area is massively overgrown with a small pathway left. It is being used for flytippers Can the rubbish be cleared and the proper maintenance of the alleyway, please
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granby Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole, 20th July
item.description:
I can only give a rough indication on the location. I hit a large pothole between junction 28 and junction 27 on the M25. The pothole course severe damage and cracked my alloy wheel.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M25, Navestock, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Light out, 20th July
item.description:
Street light out o/s 15 /17 Elm Road . Please can we inspect has it's very dark and there are lot of abandoned cars and people sleeping in cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropped kerbs for pedestrians being blocked by parked cars, 20th July
item.description:
The dropped kerb on the west end of Glenview road (north side of the road) is being blocked by parked cars. The double yellow lines stop in front of the dropped kerb so maybe they need to be extended as it makes crossing the road with a wheelchair very difficult.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenview, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 20th July
item.description:
Opposite Building supplier

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No. 28, 20th July
item.description:
Dear Camden Council, I hope you are well. I am writing on behalf of our office to request that a tree located directly outside our premises be inspected and pruned. As shown in the attached photograph, the tree has become heavily overgrown and is now obstructing a large proportion of our office windows. This significantly reduces the natural light into the office and restricts our visibility both into and out of the premises. The overgrown branches are also extending across the pavement, creating an obstruction for pedestrians. We would be grateful if the tree could be inspected and cut back at your earliest convenience to improve visibility and ensure the pavement remains clear and accessible. I have attached a photograph for your reference. Thank you for your time and assistance. We look forward to hearing from you. Kind regards, Dexters Estate Agents Cricklewood Office 020 7794 7710

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28-30, Cricklewood Broadway, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motor home, 20th July
item.description:
My father who is disabled has a difficult time coming and going out of his drive because of the motor home parked wright in front of the drive.it has been there for months now and hasn't moved.which makes it difficult for my dad.now it may be taxed and insured but there must be something you can do to see if it can be moved some where else away from being a obstruction. Can you help. It is parked outside 52 cornish Grove London Se20 8rb These are my parents resiserdens Please contact me directly On asafmehmet@yahoo.com I am a member of the family there son. My name is Asaf mehmet Mob:07958450284 Please if you can help. Thankyou Mr a Mehmet
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornish Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle vehicke reg SH11 AMR, 20th July
item.description:
Parked , jacked up ,, black bags covering windscreen . loves of bread visible on dash board .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collindale Avenue, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown tree, 20th July
item.description:
Resident called to report the tree base o/s 13 Beverley Avenue is severely overgrown, causing obstruction to the pavement and view of road, when pulling off of the drive way. Please can we inspect.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Beverley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still not cut!, 20th July
item.description:
How many times do I have to report the stretch of grass verge on Bromley council area between Montana Gardens and Meadowview Road on Worsley Bridge Road!!!!!! I been reported this missed area since 2019!!!!! Honestly why can't you just communicate with the grass cutting team? It's under the Bromley council sign for gods sake. Please cut thie area asap!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned post cart, 20th July

item.title: Flytipping in usual place, 20th July
